title: WILLAMETTE FAMILY DOWNTOWN TREATMENT CENTER - 211info
text: WILLAMETTE FAMILY DOWNTOWN TREATMENT CENTER WILLAMETTE FAMILY DOWNTOWN TREATMENT CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides evaluations and recommendations for same-day treatment services, including substance abuse and mental health treatment, primary health care, and childhood mental health admission services. 1050 High Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 762-4300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 762-4300 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private health insurance. Sliding scale fees may be available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Varies by program AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of W 10th Avenue and High Street Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
